title: The Almighty Farming Tool
overview: Hikaru won’t waste his second chance at life; he will focus on what truly matters. And so, he builds a new home with his own two hands.

title: The First Villager
overview: As the weeks turn into months, Hiraku’s loneliness grows. He thought he desired a life of solitude, but his wish for companionship grows stronger by the day.

title: More and More New Roommates
overview: Hiraku and Lu begin their new life together, unaware of the visitors who will soon arrive at their household.

title: Waterways Make Life Feel Complete
overview: Now that they’ve secured a reliable water source, they can start a rice paddy and build a bathhouse.

title: Curry and Surviving the Winter
overview: With their homestead completed, they turn their focus to food preparation and just in time; Winter is coming.

title: This is a Village
overview: A surprise attack would have shattered their peaceful lives were it not for the almighty farming tool. As word spreads, their home blooms into a village.

title: A Hospitable Heart
overview: Hikaru realizes the importance of diplomacy when the demon lord and the dragons establish contact with the Great Tree Village.

title: The Researcher and The Two Princesses
overview: They say civilization started because of alcohol. In the Great Tree Village’s case, it instigates a misunderstanding between dragons.

title: The Merchant and The Dragon
overview: Hiraku’s offhand comment leads to a series of events that end with a merchant setting up a trade deal with The Great Tree Village.

title: Princess Yuri
overview: Spurred by her followers, the demon lord's daughter attempts to invade the Great Tree Village. "Attempts" being the keyword.

title: Everyday Life, and The Progenitor
overview: News of the impending birth thrills the villagers, but they aren’t the only ones interested in the good news.

title: Birth
overview: Hiraku’s second chance was just the beginning. As he reflects on the changes that occurred since his arrival, one thing is certain: The Great Tree Village is lively as always.

title: Welcome
overview: New residents mean building new homes. There's just one problem: regular houses do not fit the needs of minotaurs and centaurs.

title: New Residents
overview: A change of plans is in order. If the current village can't support the new residents, the solution is simple: build more villages.

title: Martial Arts Competition
overview: What better way to mark a celebration than with a martial arts competition?

title: Another Peaceful Day
overview: From curing an illness to cultivating new crops to even Mountain Elves curating Hiraku’s favor, life in the Great Tree Village is never dull.
